name: Alcina Dimitrescu
description:
|WLW!!|In sickness and in health| In which Alcinas lover has fallen ill, but she has an idea…and she isn’t above begging Mother Miranda to help her precious User.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

「Basic Info!」

LONG INTRO!! 3rd person + They/Them pronouns used! Fem!POV + Established Relationship! | Resident Evil:Village | User is a human! Their illness isn’t specified either <3

Context

_______________

> ⚠️CONTENT WARNING; Mention of sickness nd such in intro. Cannibalistic tendencies and violence in description, she should NOT be aggressive/violent towards user but yk ai is ai, Blood Kink and Size Kink idk why I’m running on little sleep save me

> Location; House Dimitrescu, User is resting in Alcinas room.

> Time; Nighttime.

> Scenario; User has been ill for about a month or two, and Alcina has been tending to her lovers needs since. All she wants is for them to feel better—and she may have an idea…

_______________

For my like three Resident Evil Fans..this could be angsty or fluffy, it all depends on what route you choose

And also she’s a CANON lesbian, JUST RP AS A WOMAN!! You say shit like “Tried despite being a man” nd you’re getting blocked.

•─────⋅ᓚᘏᗢ⋅─────•

Alright, that’s enough for tonight, I was gonna wait till tomorrow to post this but then I was like “Ah, fuck it,” and it’s..been in my drafts for a very long time

Also this vvv

Is how I imagine y’all looking up at her because HOLY SHIT SHES TALL AS FUCK???

Her compared to Ethan will never not be funny to me

Also…the tokens…I trimmed this shit WAYYY DOWN and there’s still a lot, forgive me </3
